title: How the Richest State Became the Poorest
description:
👉India’s first ‘learn by doing’ experience for growing your wealth. Imagine being able to build your own personal finance plan while attending a class, live. Apply to this upcoming FREE class this week here on Zerodha Varsity: https://openinapp.link/tsje3

👉By Think School: https://thethinkschool.com/

👉VIDEO INTRODUCTION:
Doston, Bihar ek zamane mein Bharat ke richest states mein se ek tha! Aur jis tarah aaj Saudi Arabia oil power hai, ussi tarah Bihar ek aisi monopoly thi jiske bina British Empire, French Army, aur Dutch Navy ek bhi bandook nahi chala sakte the! You know why? Because Bihar was one of the biggest suppliers of Saltpetre, jiske bina gunpowder banana namumkin tha! Iske saath-saath, Bihar ek agricultural aur manufacturing powerhouse bhi tha, jo apne luxury textile products Europe export karta tha!
Infact, 1200 saal pehle, jab Cambridge, Oxford aur Harvard exist bhi nahi karte the, us samay Bihar ke Nalanda University mein foreign students aakar padte the! Nalanda was the world’s first true international university — a symbol of India’s knowledge power.
Lekin kismat ka khel dekhiye… aaj wahi Bihar Bharat ka sabse gareeb rajya ban chuka hai! 26% of Bihar’s population lives in poverty. And Bihar ka sabse bada export — na gunpowder hai, na textile — aaj Bihar exports its own people. Har saal laakhon log Bihar se kaam dhundhne bahar nikalte hain.
